summary.lv: Produktu vadītāja amats BluOr Bank, vadot un attīstot banku produktus un to ieviešanu, pārvaldot produktu dzīves ciklu un sadarbojoties ar IT komandu.
summary.en: A Product Manager role at BluOr Bank leading and developing the bank's products and their rollout, managing the product lifecycle and collaborating with the IT team.
